stepsSummary: Log a short session quickly from Log tab and verify it appears in Today + Recent.
expectedSummary: Session persists with duration/type and updates workout cards immediately.
actualResult: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/

summary: BUG: UAT-009 Time-flexible session logging - Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
reproSteps: Log a short workout session using minimal required fields.
Validate workout appears in recent list.
Navigate to Today and validate workout card includes new session.
Switch back to Log and confirm session metadata remains unchanged.
expected: Session persists with duration/type and updates workout cards immediately.
actual: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
recommendation: Fix the failing Strength flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-009 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Session persists with entered duration and type.
Verify: Today panel reflects newly logged session quickly.
